steps.title: Identify the contrast at 'but'
steps.content: The word “but” signals a contrast between Theia's previous status and the current discovery of pieces. The blank describes what Theia was before this discovery.

steps.title: Match the word to the contrast
steps.content: Notional means existing only in theory or concept, not as concrete proof. If Theia was notional, discovering actual pieces represents a shift from pure theory to claimed physical evidence. The other three choices don't express this transformation. That confirms D is correct.
